mapper.select: SELECT identifier, title, description, is_public, parent_id, start_date, end_date, default_version_id, user_id, pm_id FROM project WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.identifier, p.user_id creator, u.name AS creatorName, p.start_date As startDate, p.end_date AS endDate, p.is_lock AS isLock, p.parent_id AS parentId, p.pm_id, u2.name AS pmName, (LEVEL - 1) AS "level", ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task t WHERE t.project_id = p.id AND t.status = 'T1' ) AS totalTaskCount, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task t WHERE t.project_id = p.id AND t.status = 'T1' AND t.workflow = 'Q3' ) AS completedTaskCount, ( SELECT ROUND( SUM( (t.planned_end - t.planned_start + 1) * CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM task ch WHERE ch.parent_id = t.id AND ch.status = 'T1' ) THEN t.sub_progress ELSE t.progress END ) / NULLIF(SUM(t.planned_end - t.planned_start + 1), 0) ) FROM task t WHERE t.project_id = p.id AND t.status = 'T1' ) AS progressRate FROM project p LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN users u2 ON u2.id = p.pm_id WHERE p.status = 'K1' AND ( p.user_id = #{currentUserId} OR p.pm_id = #{currentUserId} OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM project_member pm WHERE pm.project_id = p.id AND pm.user_id = #{currentUserId} AND pm.is_delete = 'F0' ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM project ancestor WHERE ancestor.pm_id = #{currentUserId} AND ancestor.status = 'K1' AND ancestor.id IN ( SELECT sub.parent_id FROM project sub START WITH sub.id = p.id CONNECT BY PRIOR sub.parent_id = sub.id ) ) )
AND p.title LIKE '%' || #{title} || '%'
AND p.pm_id = #{pmId}
AND p.end_date >= #{startDate}
AND p.end_date < #{endDate} + 1
AND p.is_lock = 'L0'
START WITH p.parent_id IS NULL CONNECT BY PRIOR p.id = p.parent_id ORDER SIBLINGS BY p.id DESC
SELECT id AS roleId, name AS roleName FROM roles WHERE id NOT IN ('ROLE0001', 'ROLE0003')

SELECT id, name, role FROM users u WHERE status = 'H1' AND role != 'ROLE0001' AND NOT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM project_member pm WHERE pm.user_id = u.id AND pm.project_id = #{projectId} AND pm.is_delete = 'F0' )
AND name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY CASE WHEN role = 'ROLE0002' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, name

SELECT id, name FROM groups g WHERE NOT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM project_member pm WHERE pm.group_id = g.id AND pm.project_id = #{projectId} AND pm.is_delete = 'F0' )
AND name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
mapper.update: { CALL PROC_COPY_PROJECT( #{sourceProjectId, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{identifier, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isPublic, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentId, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startDate, mode=IN, jdbcType=DATE}, #{endDate, mode=IN, jdbcType=DATE}, #{userId, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pmId, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{copyMembers, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{copyVersions, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{copyIssues, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{copyDocs, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{copyWiki, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{newProjectId, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) }
mapper.select: SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE status = 'H1' AND role = 'ROLE0002'
